1 ^ Nisī quia Dominus erat in nōbīs: 2 ^ nisī quia Dominus erat in nōbīs
^ If it had not been that the Lord was: ^ if it had not been that the Lord was with us
let Israel now say: when men rose up against us

dīcat nunc Isrāel: quum īrāscerētur furor eōrum in nōs~; ^ perhaps they had swallowed us up alive
^ If it had not been that the Lord was: when their fury was enkindled against us~;

1 ^ Nisī quia Dominus erat in nōbīs: 4 ^ forsitan aqua absorbuisset nōs~; torrentem pertransīvit anima nostra~; ^ perhaps the water had swallowed us up~; our soul hath passed through a torrent~;
5 ^ forsitan pertransīvisset anima nostra aquam intolerābilem. ^ perhaps our soul had passed through a water insupportable.

^ If it had not been that the Lord was: in captiōnem dentibus eōrum. ^ Blessed be the Lord
let Israel now say: who hath not given us to be a prey to their teeth.

1 ^ Nisī quia Dominus erat in nōbīs: 7 ^ Anima nostra sīcut passer ērepta est dē laqueō vēnantium~; laqueus contrītus est
dīcat nunc Isrāel: et nōs līberātī sumus. ^ Our soul like a sparrow hath been delivered from the snare of the hunters~; the snare is broken
quī fēcit caelum et terram. ^ Our help is in the name of the Lord
